occurrences.quote: He's got the forward pressure. He's got excellent wrestling, very good control, and he puts you in a highpace blender type of fight... throwing volume boxing upstairs.

examples: Abdul Hussein has strong grappling and dangerous back-taking ability.
Abdul Hussein has nasty submission skills and is dangerous anywhere the fight goes.
Abdul Hussein has a very bad takedown accuracy.
Cody Gibson has a record of 21 wins with 12 losses.
Cody Gibson is 38 years old and in the final phase of his career.
Cody Gibson is nearly 39 years of age and carries a 21-12 record.
Cody Gibson has a good wrestling background and is a veteran.
Cody Gibson has solid wrestling fundamentals and is very active from his back with scrambles and nasty elbows.
Cody Gibson is a primary wrestler who struggles when forced to stay on the feet.
Cody Gibson struggles with grappling and TDD.
Cody Gibson will have the height and reach advantage and will look to keep Hussein off of him with footwork and front kicks.
Cody Gibson holds height and reach advantages over Abdul Hussein.
Cody Gibson gets backed up, which takes the sting off his shots and allows opponents to negate his range against the cage.
Cody Gibson has always been hitable and made a lot of mistakes on the mat.
Mike Davis suffered from breathing issues due to newly painted locker rooms during his fight against Fares Ziam.
Mike Davis has dealt with injury after injury over the last several years and rarely fights.
